positive: A minimalist, highly stylized graphic representation of a cosmic constellation forming the shape of a stylized mountain range and ancient forest. The design uses a limited palette of deep indigo, celestial cyan, metallic gold, and matte black. The stars and nebulae should be rendered as pointillist dots and smooth, flowing energy lines, contrasting sharply against the solid black background. The overall composition must be centralized and balanced, designed as an emblem or crest. The style should blend Art Deco geometry with cosmic realism, giving it a vintage, mystical, and modern feel. Clean lines, high contrast, vector art quality, perfect for screen printing on apparel.
negative: blur, artifacts, low resolution, noisy, jpeg artifacts, text, signature, watermark, poor composition, messy, extra limbs, bad anatomy, clutter
